descriptionHeader: Attractive well presented property
description:
Sole Mandate. Located less than 250 metres from the coast at Onsebaai, this well maintained home enjoys an elevated position with permanent views of the ocean looking south and mountain views to the north. The ground floor comprises an open plan living area/kitchen with adjoining scullery. A large bedroom with en suite shower and toilet and two further bedrooms share a shower and toilet. To the first floor is a very  spacious sitting room with a large built in braai. Sliding door access to the balcony with ocean views. A north facing bedroom with en suite shower and toilet. 

The double garage has access to the house. The property is fenced on three sides with a garden to the front. This is a sought after location in close proximity to the coast and all local amenities including Kleinbaai harbour. Ideal holiday home for a large family. Viewing recommended.

descriptionHeader: Spanish charm, with sea and mountain views
description:
Sole Mandate.

This welcoming Spanish-style property is perfectly positioned on a corner plot, directly opposite a greenbelt, offering a sense of space, privacy, and tranquility. As an added bonus, the home enjoys distant sea and panoramic mountain views.

The fully fenced back garden provides a sheltered outdoor living area complemented by a landscaped garden, ideal for relaxed entertaining. The front garden features a tranquil pond surrounded by low-growing fynbos shrubs and rolling lawns, creating an inviting first impression.

A Spanish-style arched front door opens into a spacious entrance hall. The generously sized main bedroom is situated at the end of the passage and includes an area ideally suited for a walk-in closet. The open-plan en-suite bathroom is fitted with both a shower and a corner bath. A stylish all-white guest bedroom, with ample space for built-in cupboards, comprises an interleading room, ideally suited to be converted into an en-suite bathroom. The guest bathroom is conveniently located to the right of the entrance hall, at the base of the staircase.

An impressive staircase adorned with blue and white tiles leads to the upper level, where a light, bright, and spacious open-plan living room, dining area, and kitchen await. The kitchen enjoys uninterrupted views across the greenbelt, panoramic mountain views from two windows, and distant sea views from another.

The study/home office is positioned adjacent to the living area and boasts beautiful distant sea and mountain views, providing an inspiring and peaceful workspace.

Pringle Bay is a small coastal village in the Overberg region of the Western Cape, South Africa. It is situated at the foot of Hangklip, on the opposite side of False Bay from Cape Point.

descriptionHeader: Exceptional 5 Bedroom Coastal Residence with Majestic Mountain Vistas
description:
Experience the perfect harmony of coastal proximity and mountain serenity in this impeccably maintained 5 bedroom, 3 bathroom residence. Situated just two streets from the Franskraal shoreline, this expansive 426sqm home offers a versatile dual living layout specifically designed for multi-generational comfort or lucrative rental opportunities.

The upper level serves as a sophisticated sanctuary, featuring a sun-drenched lounge, formal dining room, and a professional grade bar area that transitions into an indoor braai room. The heart of the home is a beautifully appointed kitchen, complete with a walk in pantry, separate scullery, and a dedicated wine storage area, all leading toward a master suite that captures breathtaking views of the Franskraal mountains.

Key Features:

•	Property Size: Substantial under roof area of 426sqm situated on a fully fenced 595sqm erf.
•	Dual-Living Layout: A self-contained ground floor featuring three bedrooms with built in cupboards, a full bathroom, a spacious kitchenette, and a private open plan lounge and dining area.
•	Master Suite: Luxury upper level master bedroom featuring a private dressing room with mountain views and an en-suite bathroom (shower, toilet, and basin).
•	Upstairs Guest Wing: A spacious second bedroom with built in cupboards, enjoying exclusive use of a nearby full family bathroom.
•	Entertainment Excellence: Choice of an indoor built in braai and bar upstairs or an outdoor stoep with a premium stainless steel built in braai overlooking the mountains.
•	Superior Maintenance: High quality finishes including durable PVC flooring and tiles, coupled with a well thought out architectural flow.
•	Technical Utilities: Two automated groundwater pumps with float switches and 10,000 litres of water harvesting tanks for sustainable garden care.
•	Storage & Parking: Double single-garage configuration on remote, with easy conversion for direct downstairs access, plus a 6x3m storeroom and a secondary internal storage area.
•	Security: Comprehensive peace of mind with a full alarm system, burglar bars, and perimeter fencing.

Location & Lifestyle:

•	Proximity to Sea: Located just two roads (walking distance) from the Franskraal coast.
•	Gansbaai: 6km for essential shopping, medical services, and world-renowned shark cage diving, eco-tourism and whale watching.
•	Hermanus: 45km to premium shopping, hospitals, and acclaimed wine estates.
•	Cape Town International Airport: Approximately 165km.

Call for a private viewing today!

 Contact us today to arrange a private viewing and experience the charm of Kleinbaai living for yourself.

descriptionHeader: 2 Bedroom, 2 Bathroom house for sale in swellendam
description:
Modern Modular Living with Breathtaking Mountain Views – Swellendam

Step into a fresh and modern lifestyle in this newly constructed modular home, perfectly positioned on the edge of Masbiekers Valley. With uninterrupted views of the majestic Langeberg Mountains and the daily spectacle of sunrise and sunset, this property offers both comfort and serenity in one of Swellendam's most picturesque locations.

The ground level offers bright, open-plan living and dining areas, perfect for entertaining or simply enjoying quiet moments. Large stackable doors open onto a patio, extending the living space outdoors. Also on this level is a spacious bedroom with Kiaat Parque Flooring and a stylishly designed bathroom. The contemporary kitchen is well-equipped with a prep bowl, gas hob, and a separate scullery, laundry area, and walk-in pantry—ensuring both practicality and plenty of storage.

Upstairs, a private guest suite awaits, complete with double doors that open onto its own balcony showcasing stunning views. This suite fitted with Kiaat Parque Flooring also boasts a private entrance from the driveway, making it ideal for guests, extended family, or as a potential Air B&B rental—while maintaining the privacy of the main house.

Additional highlights include a double garage with automated doors and direct home access, a paved driveway, a partially walled perimeter for added privacy and security, and a heat pump supplying the hot water system.

Located in the charming town of Swellendam—halfway between Cape Town and George—this home is surrounded by natural beauty, including the Koornlands River, Marloth Nature Reserve, and Bontebok National Park. Swellendam also offers an appealing mix of restaurants, cafés, boutiques, and outdoor activities, making it an ideal lifestyle destination.

This is a rare opportunity to enjoy modern living in a tranquil setting with unbeatable views. Don’t miss your chance to own a slice of paradise.

descriptionHeader: 4 Bed House - De Kelders - 38 Killarney Street.

Out of the living room there is a covered veranda with also permanent sea views. It is possible to enter the house with a sloped walkway, that makes it convenient for people with a disability to enter the house. The passage out of the living room leads to the three bedrooms, communal full bathroom. The master-on-suite bathroom with laminated flooring, built-in cupboards has also sea views. The double basement garage is larger than normal, automated door opener and direct stairs entrance from the first floor. On the ground floor at the back of the offers a flatlet with a private entrance that consists of a living area, kitchenette, bathroom and one bedroom. Due to its private entrance from the back garden, it is possible to rent it for an extra monthly income. The laundry facilities are conveniently placed in the garages for both living options. Welcome to call us at Chas Everitt Gansbaai for more information and to set up a private viewing after hours. De Kelders is well known for its peaceful tranquil atmosphere lifestyle and host the Whale watch excursions. It is nearby to the Restaurants, Service station, tidepool and walking distance to the coastal paths, Shop in Gansbaai. Not far from the Gansbaai golf course, Squash courts, Open green areas, Tidepool all in driving distance from this property.

descriptionHeader: Four Bedroom Home with Distant Sea Views For Sale In De Kelders!

Whether you’re dreaming of a permanent spot by the coast or a gorgeous getaway base, pause for a closer look at this gem in De Kelders

Kitted out for peace of mind and convenience, with an excellent alarm, beams and camera system, Solar Geyser and a top-quality 5kW inverter to keep things running smoothly during load-shedding,  the property offers dual living across two self-contained levels. Upstairs, a light-filled open-plan kitchen and living area flows out to a generous balcony with lovely distant sea views. Two bedrooms, a study, and two bathrooms complete this level, creating an easy, comfortable space for everyday living.

Downstairs, the separate flatlet (with a private entrance) is perfect for guests, extended family, or continued use as a B&B, just as it is now. Presenting an open-plan kitchen and living area, two bedrooms, and a bathroom, plus its own built-in outdoor braai area for relaxed weekends and long summer evenings. A wonderful bonus is the steady passive income it already generates, and sale of the furnishings can be negotiated.  Two single automated garages offer direct access into the home, and there’s a spacious laundry room with all the fittings you’d expect.

Once a humble fishing village dating back to 1881, De Kelders is now an increasingly sought-after suburb with beautiful new homes rising all around. Here you get the best of coastal living: hiking trails, swimming, whale watching, and the famous Walker Bay caves where our earliest ancestors once sheltered. It’s serene, full of character, and truly life-giving… living in De Kelders feels like exhaling.

The upper level features a spacious lounge with a fireplace, opening onto a balcony shared with the main en-suite bedroom, where sweeping views over the bay and surrounding mountains can be enjoyed. On the ground floor, the open-plan kitchen, living and dining area opens onto a sheltered  braai area with drop blinds, creating an inviting space for relaxed entertaining, while 2 additional bedrooms and a family bathroom provide comfortable accommodation. The property further offers a large double garage with additional carport, workshop and laundry, is fully walled for privacy, fitted with an alarm system, and complemented by a beautifully established garden. Centrally situated and within easy walking distance of local shops, eateries and Main Beach, this home is ideally suited as a permanent residence, lock up & go, coastal retreat or sound long-term investment in one of the Western Cape’s most environmentally significant coastal villages. Please contact our specialist area agent for additional information and to arrange a viewing.

descriptionHeader: This inviting property is set in an idyllic coastal town.
description:
Our Exclusive Mandate offers an exclusive lifestyle. This stunning four-bedroom home offers easy living with an open-plan lounge, dining room, and kitchen. Three of the bedrooms and two bathrooms are situated on one side of the central lounge and kitchen area. The fourth bedroom, with a sliding door to a covered veranda, is ideal for extra guests. The covered braai area, complete with stacker doors and roll-down blinds, expands the spacious room and creates a cosy atmosphere. An indoor braai shares the same chimney.  The double auto garage, with access to the covered veranda, makes it easy to bring in shopping on cold or rainy days.

The home operates entirely on an 8-kilovolt-ampere solar power system with a 20-kilovolt-ampere solar battery, 5 solar panels on the roof, and a wind turbine that charges the battery when the sun is not shining but the wind is blowing. Additionally, there are four security cameras around the home. The double garage provides secure parking and storage space. The garden, partially covered with Astro-Turf, features a freestanding pool, allowing you to enjoy the ever-changing beauty of the surrounding scenery.
 
This unpretentious holiday town offers ample opportunities to enjoy life to the fullest. With local shops and restaurants, you can indulge in kayaking, fishing, hiking along mountain trails or the seashore, sandboarding, or simply strolling along sandy shores. The Kogelberg Nature Reserve serves as a picturesque backdrop, and the town is close to Grootvlei and Rondevlei Lakes, as well as the Harold Porter National Botanical Gardens. Nestled between the mountains and the sea, it showcases the region's diverse flora.  For nature lovers, this is the perfect destination. The local parkrun is held every Saturday morning at Harold Porter. Stony Point Nature Reserve is famous for its colony of African penguins, definitely a unique spot in Betty's Bay. Call us to view our Exclusive Mandate and secure your exclusive lifestyle.

descriptionHeader: Contemporary Living in Harmony with Nature  -- Napier, Cape Agulhas R3,3m
description:
Exclusive Sole Mandate: Welcome to your sanctuary in Napier. 

Discover a home where thoughtful design meets the natural beauty of the Overberg. 

Set in tranquil Napier, this contemporary residence has been meticulously planned to celebrate the rise of the sun, the setting of the moon, bright starry night skies and the rhythms of its breathtaking surroundings. Every detail has been crafted to blend modern comfort with the serenity of nature.

Step into the expansive, lovingly tended grounds, offering quiet corners for reading, contemplation, bird watching, or stargazing beneath the crystal-clear night skies. Multiple seating areas invite you to pause, breathe, and reconnect. A built-in braai / fire pit create a warm gathering space, perfect for long evenings with friends or peaceful solo moments beside the flames.

As you enter the cool spacious home, the double-glazed aluminum sliding windows open the home to the outdoors, flooding interior spaces with natural light and framing views in every direction. Indoors and out merge seamlessly, making every season enjoyable.  

The sitting room and dining areas are airy, free flowing, bright and sunny with the fireplace warming the home in the winter months.  

The well-considered kitchen overlooks the garden, and a clever side exit leads directly to a leafy outdoor breakfast patio tucked beneath the trees. From here, access to the garage is effortless an oversized single garage offering extra breathing room for storage or workspace. A second vehicle is conveniently accommodated under the carport at the alternate entrance, complete with an electric gate.

The main bedroom with en-suite is a sanctuary of its own bright, airy, and wrapped in panoramic views with a private patio access. The second bedroom works beautifully as a single room or a dedicated study, depending on your lifestyle needs.

Adding authentic charm and character, the restored heritage cow shed sits peacefully within the garden. This versatile building --accompanied by a gentle water feature makes an ideal retreat, reading room, creative studio, or meditation space.

This is more than a home t's a thoughtfully curated experience of light, landscape, and living, where you can plant, and grow to your hearts delight. A place where nature is celebrated, functionality flows effortlessly, and tranquillity is part of everyday life.

descriptionHeader: Coastal, quiet wonder!

This coastal haven offers a perfect escape from the chaos of city life. A gentle drive along quiet gravel roads leads you through lush greenery, where the surrounding nature reserve enfolds you like a warm, protective embrace. Here, deep stillness meets the rhythmic pulse of the ocean, inviting you to slow down, breathe deeply, and let go.

Slightly elevated above the street, this charming home commands breathtaking views of the sea stretching endlessly to the horizon. Inside, the open-plan living area is bathed in natural light, with large windows perfectly framing the ever-changing coastal landscape. The rustic eat-in kitchen is designed for connection and comfort, where meals are created amid laughter, love, and the glow of fiery sunsets painting the sky.

Upstairs, the master bedroom serves as a tranquil retreat, complete with a private en-suite bathroom and a balcony overlooking the vast ocean. Each morning begins with the gentle sound of waves, while each evening settles in a warm, golden glow.

Three additional bedrooms comfortably accommodate family and friends, transforming every visit into an adventure of coastal exploration, shared stories, and evenings spent under the stars beside a crackling bonfire. Fully fenced and secure, the property offers both peace of mind and a welcoming, lived-in warmth.

The double garage doubles as a practical workshop, perfectly suited for spontaneous biking and kayaking excursions along the coast. As the seasons shift, this tranquil haven continually reinvents itself, each dawn unveiling a new canvas where time seems beautifully suspended.

Suiderstrand is more than a home. It is a way of living, an invitation to slow down and exist mindfully within nature’s timeless embrace.

Upstairs, the home offers three comfortable bedrooms and two bathrooms (including a main en suite). The main bedroom opens onto a generous balcony where you can enjoy the stunning mountain backdrop in complete privacy.  Single Title

Additional features include a double garage, a low-maintenance garden, and an abundance of natural light throughout the home—creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere.
Kogelberg Biosphere Reserve is the first Biosphere in South Africa to be proclaimed by the United Nations Educational, Scientific, and Cultural Organization (UNESCO). There are over 1,500 plant species here, 150 of which are endemic, meaning they occur nowhere else in the world. Kleinmond has a stunning blue flag beach, wonderful hiking trails, abundant fauna and flora, and a challenging 9-hole golf course. A delightful holiday, permanent living, or retirement destination.

descriptionHeader: A Coastal Sanctuary Awaits: Your Key to Paradise in Langezandt Fisherman’s Village
description:
Price Includes VAT - Imagine a life where every day feels like a tranquil escape, where the rhythm of the ocean sets your pace, and architectural beauty surrounds you. This is the promise of Langezandt Fisherman’s Village, an exclusive enclave in the charming coastal town of Struisbaai, and home to a property that is truly a magnificent find. Offered under an Exclusive Dual Mandate, this residence is not merely a house; it is a gateway to an unparalleled lifestyle.

The very essence of the Langezandt estate is a meticulous celebration of heritage and beauty. The architecture, inspired by the classic Cape Dutch style, creates an immediately picturesque and cohesive environment. The signature combination of crisp white-washed walls and rustic thatch roofs is beautifully maintained throughout, casting an ambiance of timeless serenity. Strolling through the village feels like stepping into a curated work of art, designed to inspire peace and admiration in equal measure.

The geographical location of Langezandt elevates its desirability to an extraordinary level. The village boasts the incredible amenity of direct access to the pristine sands of Struisbaai beach—a celebrated coastal gem that has earned the prestigious Blue Flag status. This coveted accolade is reserved for South Africa’s most beautiful, well-maintained, and environmentally responsible beaches. Here, the ocean is your immediate neighbour, with this exceptional home situated a mere 350 meters from the high-water mark. Imagine waking to the scent of the sea and being able to stroll to the shore within moments for an invigorating morning walk or a tranquil sunset viewing.

The main house welcomes you with an open-plan living area, fostering a seamless flow between relaxation and entertaining. It features two well-appointed bedrooms and two bathrooms, including a family bathroom and a private en-suite. Adding a unique and highly practical dimension, a charming loft space provides flexible room for an office, an extra sleeping area, or a quiet retreat.

In true Langezandt fashion, the layout embraces privacy and independence, featuring a separate, third en-suite bedroom—perfectly suited as a private guest cottage. This independent space, complete with its own entrance, offers guests a luxurious, secluded haven.

Connecting the main house and the cottage is the heart of the outdoor living space: a private, sheltered courtyard featuring the braai area and pergola. This intimate area is destined to be the backdrop for countless cherished memories—sun-drenched afternoons of relaxation, lively family lunches, and convivial evenings spent under the stars with friends. It’s a versatile space designed for lounging, sun tanning, reading, and pure, uncomplicated relaxation. Practicality is further assured with a double garage and the security of an entirely walled property.

Beyond the estate lies Struisbaai, a quaint coastal town that is a natural wonder in its own right, neighbouring Agulhas—the undisputed Southernmost Point of Africa and the breathtaking meeting place of the mighty Indian and Atlantic Oceans. This region offers a unique blend of natural splendour, marine life, and quiet, small-town charm.

This is more than a property; it’s an invitation to a life of coastal distinction, architectural elegance, and immediate access to one of South Africa’s finest beaches. Your key to paradise is waiting
